title: [Cobblemon]JoJo's Bizarre Coblemon Adventure
description: Experience JOJO in the world of Cobblemon.
body:
This is my first time creating an independently released data pack, so there might be some details I haven't handled perfectly, but I will do my best to gradually improve it in the future.

# JoJo's Bizarre Coblemon Adventure
My plan is to allow characters from JOJO to enter the world as special forms of Cobblemon, enabling both JOJO fans and Cobblemon players to enjoy this experience together.

## Important Note:
Please make sure to install the [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown); otherwise, form switching will not be possible.

## How to install:
1. Place the .zip file in /saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks.
2. Place the same .zip file in the /resourcepacks folder.
3. Enable it in-game via ESC → Options → Resource Packs.

## How to obtain these special forms:

<details>
<summary>Jotachu (Pikachu in Jotaro Form)</summary>
  
Use the Chu Platinum Disk and right-click on Pikachu to change its form!
  
The crafting recipe for the Chu Platinum Disk cannot be viewed through JEI/REI/EMI. Please follow the arrangement shown in the image to craft it in the smithing table.

![Chu Platinum Disk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f52fce0e96c97f2ea8131c0082f1caf9c72e493.png)


</details>
